'''Manod Fea''' was an office manager working for the [[Metatheran Cartel]] on [[Cularin/Legends|Cularin]]. During a time when most of the Cartel's operations were transferred to their [[Metatheran Cartel jungle base|base in the jungle]], only their [[Metatheran Cartel operations office|operations office]] remained open in [[Gadrin]], and Fea and his secretary, [[Jyll Xon]], were the only workers staffing the office.

Fea frequently came and went from the office during a work day, but was always gone for lunch for two hours around noon, leaving Xon there.

{{Char-stub}}
